title: The Third Man
comment: Loved the shadows and sewers; 'evil wears a smile' was her takeaway.

title: Tokyo Story
comment: Said the film teaches patience; the quiet rooms say as much as the dialogue.

title: The Bicycle Thief
comment: Talked about postwar dignity and the final shot's humility.

title: Double Indemnity
comment: Praised the voiceover and venetian blind lighting.

title: Some Like It Hot
comment: 'Funny can be brave'—she admired Monroe's timing.

title: The General
comment: Noted the precision of gags and locomotive stunts.

title: The Searchers
comment: Discussed myth vs. morality in the frontier.

title: Grey Gardens
comment: Sensed tenderness beneath the clutter; 'we all curate our chaos.'

title: Singin' in the Rain
comment: Choreography as storytelling; sound-era satire still sharp.
